headline: Mayor Soggy Socks Declares Every Fourth Thursday 'Backward Talking Day'
summary: .yad eht rof sdrawkcab kaeps tsum scitizen ,lautum eht ot gnidroccA
fullBody: Mayor Soggy Socks has declared every fourth Thursday 'Backward Talking Day,' requiring citizens to speak in reverse. '.skcoS yggoS royaM eht dekrowa t'nod ohw esoht rof setin fo sdnuops era erehT' Communication has ground to a halt. 'Ti gnikrow si siht,' one citizen said, then gave up. The mayor has promised to end the day at midnight, which is 'thginidniam eht,' he clarified.
